items.title: I am thrilled to announce that the live game dashboard is up and running for summer league.
items.author: Gabriel Guzman
items.body_excerpt:
I am thrilled to announce that the live game dashboard is up and running for summer league. 

Advanced box score, rotation graphics, playbyplay queries, lineup data - all now tracking Vegas games real time.

Hope this can be a meaningful addition for everyone watching.

courtsketch.com/summer_league

items.title: Hollinger POTD Zach Randolph. Michigan St PF was drafted 19th by POR in 01. Sat behind Sheed for 2 yrs before scoring 20 ppg in 03-04 (won MIP). Had nice scoring run but traded to NY where he didn't work out. Found home w/MEM as leader of grit-grind squad. Retired in 18.

items.title: Fever held to 40% in 88-75 loss to Valkyries, their first home game since returning from an 11-day road trip. Valkyries (18-7) have a league-best 8 straight wins.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever held to 40% in 88-75 loss to Valkyries, their first home game since returning from an 11-day road trip. Valkyries (18-7) have a league-best 8 straight wins.

Mitchell scored 20, Boston had 15/7, and Clark added 13/6 (but looked stiff after fall).

Next: Fri. v SEA
